question: Should v1 return only structured metrics and signals, or also deterministic template-based explanatory text, and which wording must remain CHANNELS-owned?
context: Free-form generated narrative is excluded; discovery should define whether a compact channel-neutral explanation adds value without duplicating presentation.
decision: V1 may return compact deterministic template-based explanation fields bound to cited structured metrics, signals, states, and limitations. Free-form narrative, persuasion, translation, layout, conversational wording, and delivery copy remain excluded or CHANNELS-owned.
